scripts.dev:start: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$proc = Start-Process -FilePath cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c npm run dev -- --host localhost --port 5173 --strictPort' -WorkingDirectory '.' -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput '.vite-run.log' -RedirectStandardError '.vite-run.err.log' -PassThru; Write-Output ('Started dev server on port 5173 (PID ' + $proc.Id + ').')"
scripts.dev:stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output 'Stopped dev server on port 5173.' } else { Write-Output 'No dev server found on port 5173.' }"
